items.name: Big Skies Country & western acoustic duo
items.description: lively acoustic country / folk rock/ americana covers. Great entertainment !

items.name: live music 🪕
items.description: Josh, lead singer from the Mighty Craic is coming to the Waterloo ! He will perform Irish hits, Celtic reels and pop covers as a duo with fiddler Bob. A Manchester based Irish and party band known for performing at events like the Cheltenham festival. See you for the craic!
